arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho transfer twist as Napoli reach conclusion after Man Utd talks
arts.sum: Manchester United wide man Alejandro Garnacho could find himself on the move in January, but Serie A side Napoli aren't the only side to express an interest in the Argentine

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Napoli make offer for BVB's Adeyemi
arts.sum: Napoli make their move for Borussia Dortmund' s Karim Adeyemi while Chelsea lodge an improved bid for Deportivo La Coruña winger Yeremay Hernández . - Chelsea have made an improved offer of €12m for Deportivo La Coruña winger Yeremay Hernández, Relevo reports.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Napoli make offer for Adeyemi
arts.sum: Napoli make their move for Borussia Dortmund' s Karim Adeyemi while Chelsea lodge an improved bid for Deportivo La Coruña winger Yeremay Hernández . - Chelsea have made an improved offer of €12m for Deportivo La Coruña winger Yeremay Hernández, Relevo reports.

arts.ttl: Man United continue to reject Napoli approaches for Alejandro Garnacho - but the Italian giants have not given up yet with the player open to move
arts.sum: Napoli, though, are not thought to have officially walked away from a deal; it is believed that the player would be open to a move, with cost of a deal the stumbling block.

arts.ttl: Liverpool have five Khivcha Kvaratskhelia alternatives as PSG complete Kylian Mbappe replacement mission
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain announce the signing of Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on a long-term contract from Napoli, as Liverpool concede defeat in the race for the Georgian.

arts.ttl: European football: Kvaratskhelia seals PSG move, Frankfurt sink Dortmund
arts.sum: Winger completes ‘dream’ €70m move from Napoli Frankfurt 2-0 Dortmund, Montpellier 2-1 Monaco The Georgian winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has joined Paris Saint-Germain from Serie A side Napoli on a deal until 2029, the Ligue 1 club announced on Friday. “PSG are delighted to announce the signing of Khvicha Kvaratskhelia,” the club said in a statement. “The 23-year-old winger, who will wear the No 7 shirt, becomes the first Georgian player in the club’s history.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: PSG sign Napoli forward Kvaratskhelia until 2029
arts.sum: Paris St-Germain sign Napoli and Georgia forward Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on a deal until June 2029.
